name: Ollama LLM Server
description: Ubuntu 22.04 with Ollama + Open WebUI. Requires GPU component. Recommended: 16 cores, 32 GB RAM, 100 GB disk.

commands.command: sudo apt-get install -y docker.io && sudo systemctl enable docker && sudo systemctl start docker
sudo docker run -d --name open-webui --restart always -p 3000:8080 -e OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434 -v open-webui:/app/backend/data ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
